title: [歷史大事] 公斤(kg)的定義，今日正式改以普朗克常數定義！

replies.msg:
大家好，我係意識橋

今日，2019年5月20日，
係「國際單位制 SI Unit」幾個量度單位，
新定義正式生效的大日子。
其中最重要嘅改變，
就係質量單位「公斤 kg」定義的改變。

「公斤 kg」由1889年起的嘅130年，
都係以一舊金屬來定義
但以一舊物質來定義量度單位，
無可避免地物質會隨時間而有改變。
而公斤亦係最後一個，仲未脫離到物質定義嘅單位。

有證據顯示，定義公斤嘅「國際公斤原器 IPK」，同佢班複製品比較時，質量嘅差異已經達 50微克，即係有一粒砂咁重嘅分別。

個定義出現改變，仲得了嘅？

所以上年11月，全球嘅科學家開咗個大會，
投票一致通過，
唔再用舊金屬來定義公斤，
改以宇宙中不變嘅物理常數「普朗克常數 Planck constant」來定義。


我自己見到呢個新聞，好奇研究下到底點樣用 Planck constant 定義質量，
點知一睇先發現好鬼複雜，
又「基布爾秤」，又量子效應，
用咗兩個幾星期，先叫明明地發生緊咩事

所以決定整條片黎，
幫大家慳少少時間，又了解到發生咗咩事。

https://youtu.be/3__uoXxsYyQ

頭盔就一定要帶架啦，
本人唔係 Physics 人，
量子力學啲嘢，我真係唔太識，靠睇文先明少少。
所以，希望大家如果見到我片入面有錯，
一定要話我知，我會喺片入面加 caption 更正。

replies.msg: 唉
support

題外話
片中提到嘅Silicon 28 sphere
除咗作為watt balance嘅complementary approach之外 其實仲有另一個隱藏用途

因為Silicon 28呢隻isotope有個特別 就係冇nuclear spin
所以整完個波剩低嘅材料就俾咗另一班physicists去整cubits
而cubits就係quantum computer嘅基礎 可謂完全冇任何浪費

至於點解整cubits要特登用冇nuclear spin嘅Silicon 28
下面veritasium條片有詳細解釋
https://youtu.be/zNzzGgr2mhk?t=377

quote.msg: 光子質量係零

replies.msg:
巴打 concept 好清

其實片中呢句，只係想表達，
我地現時科技未能夠用
m=hf/c^2
呢條式黎定義公斤，所以要用基布爾秤

呢個我真心唔敢自己亂講，驚講錯，
又Rest mass 又 momentum。
所以呢part ，我係直接照抄 "國際度量衡大會" 上年投票改定義之前 present 個powerpoint:

(Source: https://www.bipm.org/utils/common/pdf/CGPM-2018/Presentation-CGPM26-Phillips.pdf)
(我真心逐隻字照翻譯)

我睇過啲解釋，
話光子係無rest mass，但當粒子釋放光子後係有mass loss
我唔亂講啦，等專家解答
有料

巴打 concept 好清

其實片中呢句，只係想表達，
我地現時科技未能夠用
m=hf/c^2
呢條式黎定義公斤，所以要用基布爾秤

呢個我真心唔敢自己亂講，驚講錯，
又Rest mass 又 momentum。
所以呢part ，我係直接照抄 "國際度量衡大會" 上年投票改定義之前 present 個powerpoint:

(Source: https://www.bipm.org/utils/common/pdf/CGPM-2018/Presentation-CGPM26-Phillips.pdf)
(我真心逐隻字照翻譯)

replies.msg:
有mass loss係無錯
但唔代表photon有mass
Photon有momentum但唔代表有mass
其中一個証明photon係massless係佢用光速行，亦只可以用光速行

quote.msg: 點解個舊野重量會變？？

replies.msg:
官方答案:
" from 1889 through 1993, the detected differences in mass between supposedly identical artefacts average out to be about 50 µg per century. The reason for the changes and the reasons the changes have stopped (or paused) are, and probably will remain, a mystery. These are questions that artefact definitions invite but do not exist for the redefined kilogram. "
(Source: https://www.bipm.org/utils/en/pdf/CGPM-Press-Kit.pdf)
(即係：係一個迷)



其實近 20 年，已經無乜改變，
所以我估可能係 20 年前放 IPK 啲房，過濾空氣污染物做得唔夠好，
令 IPK 表面積咗一層舊清潔方法抹唔走嘅碳同水銀污染物
Source:
https://www.livescience.com/26017-kilogram-gained-weight.html
"... scientists realized contaminants could coat the kilogram's surface. To try to counteract this effect, they made the masses into cylinders, which have less surface area to acquire dust and debris. The IPKs are stored in filtered laboratory air at constant temperature and pressure, but there's no way to completely isolate them from air pollution and contamination, Cumpson told LiveScience.

To clean them, a skilled technician will rub the cylinders with chamois leather dipped in alcohol. But because every country cleans their kilograms differently and at different times, each kilogram in the world is off by a different, unknown amount.

Cleaning the kilogram

To see how the kilogram puts on weight, Cumpson's team used an imaging technique called X-ray spectroscopy to look at surfaces similar to those of the IPKs. Those surfaces picked up tens of micrograms of carbon-based and mercury contamination a decade. And though a few dozen micrograms is not a lot, it matters for measuring things like radioactive materials, Cumpson said.

The carbon likely comes from car exhaust, while mercury contamination occurred because mercury-filled thermometers and barometers in the laboratories occasionally break.

The team also found that using ozone and ultraviolet light treatment could reliably break the bonds between carbon atoms on the surface, taking a consistent amount of carbon-based contamination away. The mercury, however, is probably there to stay, Cumpson said.

While there are other methods, "the UV ozone method is really the only one that's competitive with the manual rubbing," he said."

Photon有momentum但唔代表有mass
其中一個証明photon係massless係佢用光速行，亦只可以用光速行

光子 有 momentum 但 無mass ，
聽落真係好神奇，
